arts.ttl: Dundee vs Celtic: TV channel, kick-off time, team news, referee & VAR
arts.sum: Below, 67 Hail Hail provide you with all there is to know about Dundee vs Celtic including the kick-off time, TV channel, team news and the officials appointed. Despite the year getting off to a horrible start in the form of a 3-0 Old Firm defeat to Rangers, Celtic have still managed to widen the gap in the games afterwards.

arts.ttl: Celtic told that allowing 'elegant footballer' to leave this January is a 'good move for all parties'
arts.sum: However, one player who has been allowed to leave temporarily is midfielder Odin Thiago Holm who left Celtic to join LAFC until the end of the season. The 24-year-old winger has barely featured since Rodgers returned as the Celtic manager and it seems he may also be allowed to leave the club this month.

arts.ttl: How much Celtic will get for Luis Palma as details of 'agreement' with club emerges
arts.sum: From August to December, Palma scored 10 goals and created 10 as he made a positive impact on Celtic’s defence of the Scottish Premiership and impact on the Champions League. Vallecano have an option to buy Palma at the end of the season and if they do, Celtic could earn £2.1m if the Honduran makes his permanent exit in the summer.

arts.ttl: Rodgers: Kyogo happy at Celtic despite speculation over future
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers will not stand in anyone's way if their heart is set on leaving Celtic - but he has detected no restlessness in Kyogo Furuhashi.
